overview: A modern, impactful multi-page NGO/Non-Profit website showcasing causes in education, environment, and healthcare. Features a demo donation flow, volunteer signup, impact statistics, and compelling storytelling across 6 pages.
features: 6-page site: Home, Causes, Donations, Volunteers, About Us, Contact
Pre-populated sample causes with fundraising progress bars
Demo donation form with impact breakdowns
Volunteer signup form with opportunity listings
Fully responsive, accessible design with warm earthy tones
